global.productPositioning: unified index for proposal lifecycle visibility

scenes.name: Hook-Fragmentation
scenes.headline: One proposal. Three platforms. Multiple stages.
scenes.voiceover: In Arbitrum governance, a single proposal can move from forum discussion to Snapshot to Tally, across different tools and different moments in time.

scenes.name: Pain-Point
scenes.headline: Hard to track. Easy to miss context.
scenes.voiceover: That makes it harder than it should be to answer one simple question: what stage is this proposal in right now?

scenes.name: Reframe
scenes.headline: Discussion. Vote. Execution. All linked in one place.
scenes.voiceover: The problem is not a lack of information. The problem is fragmentation across the proposal lifecycle.

scenes.name: Product-Reveal
scenes.headline: Arbitrum DAO Governance Tracker
scenes.voiceover: Arbitrum DAO Governance Tracker brings that lifecycle together into one unified tracker.

scenes.name: Overview-Demo
scenes.headline: Status at a glance
scenes.voiceover: You can quickly see whether a proposal is still in discussion, already voted offchain, moving onchain, or fully executed.

scenes.name: Search-Flow
scenes.headline: Find a proposal. Check its stage. Open the active source.
scenes.voiceover: Instead of jumping across governance tools, you can search once, scan the current stage, and jump directly to the relevant source.

scenes.name: Close
scenes.headline: A governance hub, not a voting interface.
scenes.voiceover: It is not a place to vote. It is the place to understand what is happening before you do.
